privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic 512x512 pixel 16-bit astronomical image generated by Python code. The input image (noisy_galaxy.tif) contains 300 hot pixels with value 65535 (maximum 16-bit value) added to a clean synthetic galaxy image consisting of a central Gaussian blob, 50 synthetic stars, and sensor noise. The ground truth clean image and input noisy image are both generated during task setup from the same seed parameters, ensuring exact reproducibility. All file paths and image parameters (16-bit depth, 65535 hot pixel value) are correctly specified.
